chunks.text: PIxar Renderman Software - UCB EECS License Pixar Renderman Software - UCB EECS License public page Pixar Renderman licenses are available within EECS on an EECS instructional license server. Access is limited to students and employees in EECS

ccess is limited to students and employees in EECS classes and research groups on EECS subnets. Computers in EECS instructional labs access these licenses. Faculty, grad students and staff with funded EECS accounts may get license information

funded EECS accounts may get license information here for their own computers (login with your EECS LDAP account and password) Please see renderman.help for more information about Renderman on the EECS instructional computers. EECS Instructional
e EECS instructional computers. EECS Instructional Support Group (ISG) WEB: http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/~inst email: inst@eecs.berkeley.edu Thu Mar 19 02:40:17 PDT 2026
